title: 荣誉附件正文｜Award Zhang Shuhao（第1部分）
content: 08 March 2024 Chair, SCSE MOE AcRF Tier 1 Seed Funding Grant Call 2023 The College invited submissions of research proposals from newly recruited faculty members with the objective of supporting promising projects that have the potential to be developed into MOE AcRF Tier 1 grant. Following evaluation by ADR and ACR, I am pleased to inform grant award to the following project: Title of Proposal PI Start Date Grant Awarded Duration Amount Parallelized Stateful Coreset Asst Prof Zhang 01 Aug 2024 3 Years S$100,000 Selection in Continuous Data Shuhao Streams for Enhanced Stream Learning The School shall undertake to open project account for the PI and inform College once account opening is completed. The School through the Chair shall exercise oversight on grant utilization as well as project deliverables to ensure the research will lead to strategic research proposal development and application to MOE AcRF Tier 1 grant at the end of the project. Please complete and return the Acceptance Form to Assoc Dean (Research), CoE by 18 March 2024 if the School accepts the grant award and its accompanying terms and conditions. Professor Tan Yap Peng Associate Vice President (Lifelong Learning – Postgraduate Programmes by Coursework) Interim Dean, College of Engineering cc: Associate Dean (Research), CoE Assistant Professor Zhang Shuhao, SCSE MOE AcRF Tier 1 Seed Funding Grant Call 2023 ACCEPTANCE FORM Please complete the Acceptance Form and send the original and scanned copy to Assoc Dean (Research), CoE by 18 March 2024. Please tick () where applicable. The School accepts the grant award and agrees to the terms of the grant award, grant utilization and project governance specified below: a. Budget phasing form to be completed. b. The requested budget should comply with the Fundable/Non-fundable list of MOE AcRF Tier 1 and approved by School. c. School shall open the project account for the PI and inform College once done. d. The utilization of the grant should adhere closely to the expenditures as specified in the proposal and budget phasing form. e. The grant must be utilised within three years from account opening, with no extension. f. The School via the School Chair shall maintain oversight of the project spending and deliverables. g. The fund management of the project (e. g. account creation, submission of progress reports, request for grant variation etc. ) will follow existing procedures for a standard MOE AcRF Tier 1 project. h. School ACR shall ensure PI submits a Tier 1 proposal is to be submitted through the School within one year from project end date. Title of Proposal PI Start Date Grant Awarded Duration Amount Parallelized Stateful Coreset Asst Prof Zhang 01 Aug 2024 3 Years S$100,000 Selection in Continuous Data Shuhao Streams for Enhanced Stream Learning The School declines the grant award.
